customer.transfer.accept_description: By accepting, you will become the owner of this workspace and responsible for its billing.
customer.transfer.accept_disclaimer: The transfer will be completed immediately upon acceptance.
customer.transfer.already_completed: This transfer has already been completed.
customer.transfer.cancelled: This transfer was cancelled by the owner.
customer.transfer.link_expired_descripti: The transfer link you are trying to access has expired. Request a new invitation from the current owner.
customer.transfer.new_owner_details_desc: Enter the email of the person who will receive ownership of this workspace.
customer.transfer.not_available: This transfer is no longer available.
customer.transfer.notes_placeholder: Add a message for the recipient...
customer.transfer.ownership_description: Transfer ownership of this workspace to another person.
customer.transfer.recipient_email_help: An email will be sent to this person with a link to accept the transfer.
customer.transfer.rejected: This transfer was rejected by the recipient.
customer.transfer.title: Transfer
customer.transfer.warning_description: By transferring, you will lose administrative access and billing responsibility will be transferred to the new owner.
customer.transfer.you_have_been_invited: You have been invited to receive ownership of a workspace.
